ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product type */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sale was made */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product on hand */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product (i.e., when to restock) */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product to reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each low stock alert */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product with low stock */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product on hand at the time of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_stock_alerts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reorders" (
  "reorder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reorder */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reordered */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date the reorder was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product reordered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reorder was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reorder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reorder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reorders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales analyst, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., sales, inventory) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report this detail belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reported on */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity sold of the product */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report detail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
